---
title: "Statistical Modeling 1"
subtitle: "OLS model with diagnostics"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
---

# Goal

Use an AI agent to fit a basic OLS model and produce a complete diagnostic report.

# Recommended Dataset

Use:

```text
data/simulated/neighborhood_health_survey_analysis.csv
```

Possible outcome:

```text
mean_daily_sodium_mg
```

Possible predictors:

```text
age_years, gender, race_ethnicity, education_adults_20_plus, family_income_to_poverty, mean_daily_energy_kcal
```

# Acceptance Criteria

Your report should include:

- A stated research question.
- A cleaned analysis dataset.
- A model formula.
- Model coefficient table.
- Plain-language interpretation of key coefficients.
- Residual diagnostics.
- Checks for influential observations.
- Checks for collinearity or redundant predictors.
- A short statement of model limitations.
- A section explaining what you checked manually after the AI produced output.

# Work Area

```{r}
# Start here.
```
